display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vnstat; official homepage and man page use vnStat capitalization.
docs_sources: Official vnStat homepage links to dedicated man pages; vnstat.html documents command usage and options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official vnStat homepage lists Git repository: https://github.com/vergoh/vnstat.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies network traffic monitoring; official homepage describes Linux and BSD console traffic monitoring and multiple output options.
